Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago

bonuses: 1.5× Hatch Candy
1.5× Hatch Stardust
1/2 Egg Hatch Distance
1/2 Stardust cost for all trades
2-hour Incense duration (excluding Daily Adventure Incense)
2-hour Lure Module duration
2× Catch Candy
Hourly event-themed Field Research
Increased chance of catching Pokémon with a Premier Ball
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon for ticket holders
Increased time for Party Play sessions
Open up to 50 Gifts each ticketed citywide gameplay day
Special event-themed Eggs
Special event-themed stickers available from PokéStops and Gifts
Trainer Challenges: four Timed Research challenges across Chicago that count toward the Pokémon GO Expert medal
Up to 6 Special Trades per day
Up to 9 daily Raid Passes by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
spawns: Caterpie wearing a Poké Ball hat
eggs: Caterpie wearing a Poké Ball hat

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Location: Grant Park, Chicago, Illinois, United States Dates: June 5–7, 2026 Time: 10:00 a.m. – 8:00 p.m. CDT (Park and citywide event hours vary by ticket)
Trainers can look forward to exceptional coaching by Team Instinct’s leader, Spark, during an exciting park session in Grant Park that will help them become their very best. Ticket-holding Trainers will also set off on a citywide adventure across four distinct City Districts in Chicago, developing their skills and earning a unique in-game Pokémon GO Expert medal.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the park experience within Grant Park during the date and time noted on your event ticket. Citywide gameplay requires either a Base event ticket with citywide gameplay, a Citywide Gameplay add-on, or a City Explorer ticket.

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Location: Fælledparken, Copenhagen, Denmark Dates: June 12–14, 2026 Time: 9:00 a.m. – 6:00 p.m. CEST (Park and citywide event hours vary by ticket)
Trainers can look forward to exceptional coaching by Team Valor’s leader, Candela, during an exciting park session in Fælledparken that will help them become their very best. Ticket-holding Trainers will also set off on a citywide adventure across four distinct City Districts in Copenhagen, developing their skills and earning a unique in-game Pokémon GO Expert medal.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the park experience within Fælledparken during the date and time noted on your event ticket. Citywide gameplay requires either a Base event ticket with citywide gameplay, a Citywide Gameplay add-on, or a City Explorer ticket.

Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global

bonuses: 1/2 Stardust cost for all trades
Branching Timed Research with a choice between Mega Mewtwo X or Mega Mewtwo Y
Different Pokémon type-themed Field Research every hour
Global Challenges to unlock additional bonuses and Ultra Unlock events
Incense (excluding Daily Adventure Incense) will attract special Pokémon
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon
Lure Modules activated during the event will last for one hour
Open up to 50 Gifts each day
Party Play will be active for nine hours
Special Research including an encounter with Zeraora
Up to nine free Raid Passes per day by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to six Special Trades each day

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global! This worldwide event takes place from July 11, 2026 at 10 am to July 12, 2026 at 7 pm local time.
For the first time, GO Fest: Global is free for all Trainers who log in during event weekend. Everyone can access the featured Special Research, event bonuses, and increased Shiny encounter opportunities at no cost.

Event.title: Example Event Template (Auto ToC Demo)
Event.description:
This file demonstrates the reusable event pattern:
- Keep all section if blocks in the template body.
- Set event_toc_auto: true.
- Fill data lists only for sections you want to show.
- Leave unused section data empty to auto-hide both section and ToC item.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Electabuzz during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On June 8, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Electabuzz.
- Electabuzz

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Pokémon North America International Championships 2026 Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Pokémon North America International Championships 2026 Cup: Great League Edition will run from June 2, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to June 9, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Fairy-, Normal-, Psychic-, and Water-type Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon that are also Dark-, Grass-, or Steel-type are not eligible.
- Shadow Pokémon are eligible.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are not eligible.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Clefable

- Poliwrath

These Pokemon will remain in their respective regions.

Lugia and the Timed Incubator return for GO Pass: June!
From Tuesday, June 2, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, July 7, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for June will be available in Pokémon GO!

Season.title: Forever Forward

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
Increased limits on opening, receiving from PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs, and storing Gifts
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Forever Forward!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.
